mapper.select:
SELECT clz.*, e.name AS master_name, CASE WHEN clz.begin_date > NOW() THEN '未开班' WHEN NOW() > clz.end_date THEN '已结课' ELSE '在读' END AS status FROM clazz AS clz LEFT JOIN emp AS e ON e.id = clz.master_id
AND clz.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND clz.end_date between #{begin} and #{end}
ORDER BY clz.update_time DESC
